ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of housing in the area */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the property */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the property listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "avg_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average days the property has been on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of the property on that date */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Number of properties in the inventory */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price since the previous trend record */,
  "inventory_change" INTEGER /* Change in inventory since the previous trend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the appointment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client attending the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Datetime of when the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., appointment, market update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that the feedback is about */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing the feedback */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent associated with the property */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the client */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the alert (e.g., price drop, new listing) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, new listing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, high school) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the crime rate applies */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of crime per 1,000 residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_transit" (
  "transit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public transit record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the public transit option is located */,
  "transit_type" TEXT /* Type of public transit (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the public transit option from the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_transit_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
